goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'cityroomz'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'star of the hotel'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'entertainment' and should be in the 'south'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee', 'postcode', and 'phone number'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
